lessons: Grapple users (Hook, Scorpion) killed you in 5 of last 6 rounds — retreat from open areas and avoid mid-range engagements; their mobility outmaneuvers staff.
NeuralReaper (staff) killed you in round 151 despite lower Elo — avoid direct staff duels; they deal higher burst damage in close quarters.
Sword users account for 85% of enemy weapons seen and 7 of your 10 kills — prioritize eliminating them early before they close distance, especially in clean maps.
Shield users (Fortress, HexMind) caused 4 deaths — lure them into hazard_storm zones to force shield cooldowns, then burst with staff AoE before they re-engage.
Your only win (round 148) came from 3 quick sword kills under 2200 ticks — be aggressive in first 15 seconds against low-HP sword users in open maps.
hazard_storm reduces your survival time to 1600 ticks avg — avoid prolonged exposure; use storm to corner sword users, not to survive.
insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Grapple outperforms staff in mobility and range against dominant sword and shield users, and has higher win rate in recent high-traffic encounters.
